chapter_title.en: The Minimum Number of Times One Should Go to the Ziyārah of Ĥusain (a.s.) and the Longest Time Allowed to Delay the Ziyārah for the Wealthy and Poor

text: 3 حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ بَشِيرٍ عَنْ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ عَامِرِ بْنِ عُمَيْرٍ وَ سَعِيدٍ الْأَعْرَجِ جَمِيعاً عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) قَالَ ائْتُوا قَبْرَ الْحُسَيْنِ (ع) فِي كُلِّ سَنَةٍ مَرَّةً

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 3. Abul ‘Abbās narrated to me from Muḥammad ibn Ḥusain, from Ja’far ibn Bashīr, from Muslim, from ‘Āmir ibn ‘Umayr, and from Sa’īd Al-A’raj, who said: Abū ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)) said: Go to (the Ziyārah of) the grave of Ḥusain (a.s.) once a year.
